inputs.label: Design Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniformly distributed design load including finishes and live load.

businessContext_i18n.en: Uniformly distributed design load including finishes and live load.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplamalar ve hareketli yük dahil düzgün yayılı tasarım yükü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gleichmäßig verteilte Bemessungslast inklusive Ausbaulasten und Nutzlast.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge uniformément répartie incluant les finitions et la charge d'exploitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga de diseño uniformemente distribuida incluyendo acabados y carga viva.

inputs.label: Allowable Bending Stress
inputs.businessContext: Material allowable stress (e.g., 165 MPa for S275 steel).

businessContext_i18n.en: Material allowable stress (e.g., 165 MPa for S275 steel).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme izin verilen gerilmesi (örneğin S275 çeliği için 165 MPa).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Materialspannung (z. B. 165 MPa für S275-Stahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte admissible du matériau (ex. 165 MPa pour l'acier S275).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión admisible del material (ej. 165 MPa para acero S275).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor for allowable stress design.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety factor for allowable stress design.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzin verilen gerilme tasarımı için güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de sécurité pour le calcul aux contraintes admissibles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad para el diseño por tensiones admisibles.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
